generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to be prepared. Did you know that excessive civil defense spending actually weakens our national security? Experts agree that we should focus on smart, targeted investments rather than wasteful preparedness programs. Let's ensure our tax dollars are used wisely to protect what truly matters. #NationalSecurity #SmartSpending
